flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at D'Youville  University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.1k → $34.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at D'Youville  University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.1k → $34.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at D'Youville  University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (56.7% vs 62.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at D'Youville  University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
